title: pack.png painting
description: Add the original pack.png image among the others paintings
body:
Add the famous original pack.png image among the others paintings.

The main painting is a 4x4 frame without downgrades the image quality.

There is another painting, but unplaceable in survival (only invalid with commands), which is a full size of the image, so an 8x8 frame (that very big).

Paintings id:
- `minecraft:pack_png` (placeable in survival)
- `minecraft:pack_png_big`  (unplaceable in survival, only commands)
